town allow it to fall down, there would be danger in store; and if
boys clap their hands or if animals fight each other, at that time,
there would be fighting.

Then the carpenter should plane the trunk (of the tree) and
mount it on a platform, so that it is kept horizontally with its tip
resting on something. On the 11th lunar day of the same month
the king should cause vigil to be observed at night. The royal
